features: build_sample_agent_state — constructs a minimal agent state dict representing a pending grant decision
preflight_grantlayer — checks GrantLayer health and readiness; dry-run safe
prepare_grant_decision_context — builds API call bodies for /demo-action and /grants
run_dry_run_workflow — full workflow with no network calls, safe for CI and offline demos
run_local_workflow — optional execute mode against a locally running GrantLayer backend
CLI with --base-url, --token, --execute flags; defaults to dry-run
LangGraph StateGraph node adaptation notes in docstrings and comments
LangChain Tool adaptation notes in docstrings and comments
Token never logged or returned in output
GL-147 SDK path injection via sys.path — no pip install required
safety_caveats: token is never logged or returned in output
no external LLM or API key required
no network calls made in dry-run mode
